zh.Prestonpans, Haddingtonshire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾普雷斯頓潘斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Christian Seton於1395年出生在英國蘇格蘭培爾培斯時，她的父親John Seton 2nd Lord of Seton26歲，母親Catherine Sinclair20歲。她和Norman Leslie至少有1個兒子。她去世在英國英格蘭。

zh-hans.Prestonpans, Haddingtonshire, Scotland: 苏格兰哈丁頓史爾普雷斯頓潘斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Christian Seton于1395年出生在英国苏格兰培爾培斯时，她的父亲John Seton 2nd Lord of Seton26岁，母亲Catherine Sinclair20岁。她和Norman Leslie至少有1个儿子。她去世在英国英格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Seton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Midlothian) and English: variant of   Seaton  .

variants.name: Seaton
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Seaton, such as those in Cumberland, Devon, Durham, Leicestershire, Northumberland, Rutland, East Yorkshire, and North Yorkshire, most of which derive from Old English sǣ ‘sea, lake’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, though the Leicestershire placename probably arises from an Old English personal name Sǣga or a stream-name Sǣge (from Old English sǣge ‘slow moving’; compare Seabrook ) + Old English tūn.
Scottish: habitational name from Seton (East Lothian), from Old English sǣ ‘sea’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: Christian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Christianus ‘follower of Christ’, in use as a given name from the Middle Ages onwards, especially as a girl's name. The name of Christ (Greek Khristos) is a translation of the Hebrew term Messiah ‘anointed’.

variants.name: Christianne
meanings: From Latin Christianus ‘follower of Christ’, in use as a given name from the Middle Ages onwards, especially as a girl's name. The name of Christ (Greek Khristos) is a translation of the Hebrew term Messiah ‘anointed’.

en.lifeSummary: When Christian Seton was born in 1395, in Perth, Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, John Seton 2nd Lord of Seton, was 26 and her mother, Catherine Sinclair, was 20. She had at least 1 son with Norman Leslie. She died in England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Christian Seton est née en 1395, à Perth, Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Seton 2nd Lord of Seton, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Catherine Sinclair, avait 20 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Norman Leslie. Elle est décédée à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Christian Seton 1395 in Perth, Perthshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Seton 2nd Lord of Seton 26 und ihre Mutter Catherine Sinclair 20. Sie hatte mit Norman Leslie mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Christian Seton è nata il nel 1395 nel Perth, Perthshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Seton 2nd Lord of Seton, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Catherine Sinclair, aveva 20 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con Norman Leslie. Morì nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Christian Setonが1395年にイギリススコットランドペルスシュアイアペルスで生まれた時，父John Seton 2nd Lord of Setonは26歳，母Catherine Sinclairは20歳であった。彼女はNorman Leslieとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女はイギリスイギリスで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Christian Seton(이)가 1395년 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르 퍼스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Seton 2nd Lord of Seton(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Catherine Sinclair(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 Norman Leslie(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Christian Seton nasceu em 1395, em Perth, Perthshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Seton 2nd Lord of Seton, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Catherine Sinclair, tinha 20 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho com Norman Leslie. Ela faleceu em Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Christian Seton родилась в 1395 г. в местности пирт, пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Seton 2nd Lord of Seton было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Catherine Sinclair, 20. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Norman Leslie. Она умерла в местности Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Christian Seton nació en 1395, en Perth, Perthshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, John Seton 2nd Lord of Seton, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Catherine Sinclair, tenía 20 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Norman Leslie. Murió en Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
